title: artanthe oblongata
intro: Artanthe oblongata, also known as the "arrowroot" or "canna," is a plant species that belongs to the family Marantaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat wounds, skin infections, and fever. The health benefits of Artanthe oblongata include its ability to reduce swelling and pain, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Artanthe oblongata can be made into a paste or a poultice, which can be applied topically to affected areas, or used as a tea to promote overall health and well-being.
